creator: rostyslav@optonine.net
text:
I installed Ndis driver in My DeskTopBSD(amd64) I got interface ndis0 (light led also is on) but there is no link. I was trying to do everything but it does not want to connect to A.P. Nothing helps(dhclient, ifconfig, reconfigure rc.conf(ifconfig_ndis0...) /etc/rc.d/netif restart etc.). Please help me with this.
HP Pavilion DV8000(AMD Turion64)
